summary: Iteration 23: Rebrand to 'Semantic Vision' + Contest Edit Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend: 16/16 passed. Frontend: All rebrand and contest edit functionality verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Rebrand from LexiMaster to Semantic Vision is complete across: Landing page, Login page, Parent Portal, Admin Dashboard, Page title, Footer, all 20 i18n locale files
PUT /api/admin/contests/{id} correctly updates all fields: title, description, prize_description, prize_value, start_date, end_date, runner_up_prizes, is_active
Contest edit modal in Admin Portal properly pre-fills all fields with existing contest data
ISO dates are correctly converted to datetime-local format for the edit form inputs
Runner-up prizes (2nd and 3rd place) are properly extracted from array and displayed in separate form fields
seed_data_creation: Used existing 'March Madness Referral Blitz' contest for testing edit functionality
context_for_next_testing_agent: Rebrand to 'Semantic Vision' is complete. Contest edit functionality fully working. The existing 'March Madness Referral Blitz' contest has prize $200, 2nd place $100 Gift Card, 3rd place 6 Months Premium. Edit modal pre-fills all fields correctly including runner_up_prizes.
